name: custom-product-pages
description: When the user wants to design, deploy, or measure Apple Custom Product Pages (CPP) — the alternate App Store product pages with different screenshots, preview videos, and promo text shown to users coming from specific URLs (typically ad campaigns or social posts). Use when the user mentions "Custom Product Page", "CPP", "alternate product page", "App Store URL variant", "ASA CPP", "campaign-specific landing page", "product page per audience", "App Store Connect CPP", "ppoUrl", "?cpp=" parameter,
author: Eronred
